response.justification: While Bogdan has strong experience in software development, his background is heavily skewed toward JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang, with limited recent exposure to C++ (last significant C++ work was at National Instruments in 2015). His expertise does not align closely with the industrial automation and cybersecurity requirements of the role, particularly IEC 62443 standards, multi-threaded systems, or message-broker architectures. His strengths in web and cloud technologies are valuable but not directly applicable to the core responsibilities.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and frameworks
Strong problem-solving and analytical skills demonstrated by diverse project portfolios
Experience with secure development practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last significant work was in 2015)
No direct experience with industrial automation protocols (Modbus TCP/IP, IEC 61850, etc.)
Lacks exposure to IEC 62443 cybersecurity standards and secure development lifecycle for industrial systems
